message.content:
Here’s the current weather for Indianapolis (today):

Conditions: Mostly cloudy with a chance of light rain or storms

Temperature: Around ~70°F (21–22°C)

Feels like: Slightly cooler due to wind

Wind: Moderate, with occasional stronger gusts

Rain chance: Moderate (showers possible later today) 
Pogoda.ru

Quick take

Not a terrible day, but unsettled

You might get on-and-off rain

Expect breezy conditions

What to do

Bring a light jacket or hoodie

Keep an umbrella handy

If you’re out later, check radar—storms can pop up

If you want, I can give you an hour-by-hour breakdown or check for severe weather alerts.
